# Foodies Pakistan

> Foodies Pakistan is a restaurant discovery and table-booking platform for diners across Pakistan. Browse restaurants by city, view menus and deals, read reviews, and reserve tables online.

## Main pages

- [Home](https://foodiespakistan.pk/): Discover top restaurants, deals, and dining guides in Pakistan.
- [About Us](https://foodiespakistan.pk/about-us): Mission, team, and how Foodies Pakistan works.
- [Contact Us](https://foodiespakistan.pk/contact-us): Get in touch with the Foodies Pakistan team.
- [Articles](https://foodiespakistan.pk/articles): Food and dining guides, tips, and editorial content.

## Cities

- [Lahore restaurants](https://foodiespakistan.pk/lahore/): Browse and book restaurants in Lahore.
- [Karachi restaurants](https://foodiespakistan.pk/karachi/): Browse and book restaurants in Karachi.
- [Islamabad restaurants](https://foodiespakistan.pk/islamabad/): Browse and book restaurants in Islamabad.

## Deals & services

- [Lahore deals](https://foodiespakistan.pk/lahore/deals/): Bank card and dining deals in Lahore.
- [FoodiePrime](https://foodiespakistan.pk/prime/): Premium membership benefits for diners.
- [Partner with us](https://foodiespakistan.pk/partner/): Information for restaurant owners and partners.

## Policies

- [Privacy Policy](https://foodiespakistan.pk/privacy-policy): How user data is collected and used.
- [Terms & Conditions](https://foodiespakistan.pk/terms-conditions): Terms of use for the platform.
- [Disclaimer](https://foodiespakistan.pk/disclaimer): Legal disclaimer and liability information.

## Optional

- [Sitemap index](https://foodiespakistan.pk/sitemap-index.xml): Full XML sitemap index for crawlers.
- [Robots.txt](https://foodiespakistan.pk/robots.txt): Crawler access rules for AI and search bots.
